## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss the AI Optimization (AIO) guide outline and clarify content strategy for Imubit's marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on creating a top-of-funnel, 15-page executive playbook for AI optimization implementation](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Guide should be industry-agnostic, offering general best practices without being Imubit-specific](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Content to include real-world scenarios, readiness checklists, and key considerations for AI implementation](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
  - [Plan to create industry-specific versions in the future, starting with a general process industries version](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)

## Topics

### AIO Guide Outline and Target Audience

  - [Guide to target buyer personas (executives, site champions)](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [Content should be high-level, graphics-heavy with short reads](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=771.0)
  - [Focus on educating prospects about AI optimization journey, not Imubit-specific offerings](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [Include sections on: what's at stake, approach considerations, security/reliability concerns, governance, and site readiness](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)

### Content Strategy and Distribution

  - [Integrate guide with existing blog content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [Consider creating industry-specific versions (e.g., cement, oil & gas) in the future](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [Use blog posts to drive traffic to the guide through banners or CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1278.0)
  - [Explore emerging markets (e.g., alternative fuels) for potential new use cases](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

### Website Structure and Industry Focus

  - [Current website structure includes 5 main industries](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1458.0)
  - ["Process Industries" serves as a catch-all for other verticals](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1590.0)
  - [Open to exploring opportunities in new industries (e.g., food industry) as emerging markets](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)

### Guide Development Approach

  - [Start with one general version for process industries](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [Consider creating different cover pages for industry-specific appearances](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [Utilize real stories and scenarios from Imubit's delivery team knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1045.0)
  - [Balance between providing valuable information and maintaining Imubit's competitive edge](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Refine AIO guide outline to focus on top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1175.0)
  - [Mariana to review and incorporate the project meeting notes document shared by Rebecca](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)
  - [Tim to share Otter transcription of Cosun Beet Company conversation for potential content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1402.0)
  - [Team to decide on the scope of the guide (top-of-funnel vs. full implementation journey)](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [Explore keyword opportunities for building materials and other related industries](https://fathom.video/share/Xs_7Vvrvzj_oDiHYbvKKAkMy3xnZEzQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
